scenario.name: Smoke unknown dialog BYE is rejected
scenario.send: BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: SIPp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=unknown-server-tag Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
